---
title: "DE4W26 – Data engineering for wearables"
---

**Tech stack exercises**

*as ususal in G2.U.10 (Campus III, Digital Health Cluster, basement floor)*  

Repo website [source code](https://github.com/brry/DE4W26)

| Date | Topic |
|------|-------|
| 2026-05-04, 13:30-15:00 | Python, R, IDE, installation: [slides](1_software.html), [guide](2_installation.html) |
| 2026-05-05, 09:15-10:45 | git + quarto data science pipeline: [slides](3_publishing.html), [exercise](4_exercise.html) |
